nasb.text: When the men of Israel who were on the other side of the valley, with those who were beyond the Jordan, saw that the men of Israel had fled and that Saul and his sons were dead, they abandoned the cities and fled; then the Philistines came and lived in them.

esv.text: And when the men of Israel who were on the other side of the valley and those beyond the Jordan saw that the men of Israel had fled and that Saul and his sons were dead, they abandoned their cities and fled. And the Philistines came and lived in them.

cnv.text: 在山谷那邊，和約旦河那邊的以色列人，看見以色列人逃跑，掃羅和他的兒子都死了，他們就棄城逃跑。非利士人就來住在城中。

ccb.text: 平原一带和约旦河对面的以色列人见以色列军败逃、扫罗及其众子已死，都弃城而逃。于是，非利士人占据了那些城邑。
